name: IBM Security Randori Recon
description: Continuous attack surface management that discovers external-facing assets from an adversary's perspective, providing target temptation scoring and automated asset attribution

actions.name: List Targets
actions.description: Retrieve discovered external targets with temptation scores indicating attacker attractiveness

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field (e.g., '-target_temptation' for descending temptation score)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

actions.name: Get Target Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific target including services, technologies, and attack paths

parameters.name: target_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the target

actions.name: List Hostnames
actions.description: Retrieve discovered hostnames and domains in the attack surface

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

actions.name: List IP Addresses
actions.description: Retrieve discovered IP addresses associated with the external attack surface

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

actions.name: List Services
actions.description: Retrieve discovered services running on external assets

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Get Risk Score
actions.description: Retrieve the organization's overall attack surface risk score

actions.name: List Findings
actions.description: Retrieve security findings including exposures, misconfigurations, and vulnerabilities

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return
